audit_findings.finding: RUNTIM-06: save_tool_result 两处裸 except Exception: pass 静默吞错，写入失败无声；同文件 _write_session_state (line 463-464) 已用 stderr 打印
audit_findings.remediation: _atomic_write_json 失败分支 print(f'⚠️ 写入失败 {path}: {e}', file=sys.stderr) 替代 pass；except 收 OSError/TypeError/ValueError
